Clio and Daphene were hanging out in the garage. They saw a rack and a backpack. They found a bottle in the rack. Daphene left the garage. Clio moved the bottle to the backpack. Where was the bottle previously

A. backpack
B. rack

Person A moved the item to location Y.

A. cabinet
B. closet

[Instruction]

[Output]
Person A is Neila. Person B is Juanita. The item is towel. The location X is closet. The location Y is cabinet.
So, the answer is [B]
